title: Disposition of purchase price
doc_html:
§805.  Disposition of purchase price

Out of the purchase price paid, the State Treasurer shall pay the cost of advertisement and shall place the balance to the credit of the various school boards entitled to receive the money.
doc_text:
§805.  Disposition of purchase price
Out of the purchase price paid, the State Treasurer shall pay the cost of advertisement and shall place the balance to the credit of the various school boards entitled to receive the money.
